channel.title: Problem with post pages/subpages
channel.description:
Hi Frontity community! :wave:
I have a problem with my first Frontity project, it's unfinished and posts are just for sample. I have app deployed on Vercel and domain is pointed to this app at Vercel settings, its https://puzzletywnie.pl
Wordpress source is under https://ssl-puzzletywnie.ovh/
And to the point: When you enter main adress everything is ok, but when you enter any post or nav link and hit refresh you will get **Internal Server Error**. The same situation is when you will try to enter site by a direct link for example: https://puzzletywnie.pl/positiano-clementoni/.
That problem is not appearing when you hit direct source of WP for example https://ssl-puzzletywnie.ovh/positiano-clementoni/
I think is something about routing or maybe domain setting but I cant get the problem solved. Can someone help me with that?
Here link to my repo when you can find this project: https://github.com/TSypko/puzzletywnie
Sorry for ugly code formatting in some places but its still under construction ;)
Thank you in advance!

item.title: Problem with post pages/subpages
item.dc:creator: tsypko
item.description:
Hello again,
problem solved

Main culprit was that line of code @ post.js

<Title dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: post.title.rendered }} onClick={actions.analytics.event({ name: "tytul wpisu", payload: { category: "wpisy", label: post.title.rendered } })} />

But still, I dont know why this onClick analytics event was causing the problem.

Read full topic

item.title: Problem with post pages/subpages
item.dc:creator: tsypko
item.description:
Unfortunately I get just same error and thats all.
“GET http://localhost:3000/positiano-clementoni/ 500 (Internal Server Error)”

Same situtation as on live version.

Read full topic

item.title: Problem with post pages/subpages
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @tsypko,

Welcome to our Community!

tsypko:

When you enter main adress everything is ok, but when you enter any post or nav link and hit refresh you will get Internal Server Error.

When you launch the project locally and you get this message in the browser you should also get some errors from the terninal. What are they saying?

Read full topic

item.title: Problem with post pages/subpages
item.dc:creator: tsypko
item.description:
Hi Frontity community!

I have a problem with my first Frontity project, it’s unfinished and posts are just for sample.
I have app deployed on Vercel and domain is pointed to this app at Vercel settings, its https://puzzletywnie.pl

Wordpress source is under https://ssl-puzzletywnie.ovh/

And to the point:
When you enter main adress everything is ok, but when you enter any post or nav link and hit refresh you will get Internal Server Error. The same situation is when you will try to enter site by a direct link for example: https://puzzletywnie.pl/positiano-clementoni/.

That problem is not appearing when you hit direct source of WP for example Positiano, Clementoni – Puzzletywnie

I think is something about routing or maybe domain setting but I cant get the problem solved. Can someone help me with that?

Here link to my repo when you can find this project:

github.com

TSypko/puzzletywnie

Contribute to TSypko/puzzletywnie development by creating an account on GitHub.

Sorry for ugly code formatting in some places but its still under construction

Thank you in advance!

Read full topic
